claim.text: Chest pain with shortness of breath can be associated with serious conditions requiring urgent evaluation.

evidence.description: Brief plain-language description of what this evidence is and why it matters.
evidence.snippet: Chest pain with dyspnea is a high-risk presentation warranting urgent assessment.

reasoning_atoms.statement: Guideline excerpt supports the triage risk statement.
reasoning_atoms.notes: Guideline excerpt supports the general triage risk statement.

metadata.notes: L1 example: basic factual claim + single supporting evidence + minimal reasoning atom.
